description_long: This is a large, modern agricultural tractor with a robust green and black body, featuring a fully enclosed operator cabin with large windows for visibility. The tractor is equipped with four wide rubber tracks instead of traditional wheels, providing enhanced traction and stability on various terrains. The front of the tractor has a prominent hood and dual vertical exhaust stacks, while the rear includes a heavy-duty hitch and hydraulic connections for towing or attaching implements. The cabin is fitted with side mirrors, roof-mounted lights, and safety beacons, indicating readiness for both day and night operation. The overall design is streamlined and functional, with reinforced fenders and a sturdy chassis. The color scheme is predominantly green with yellow accents on the tracks and black detailing on the engine and fenders.
description: A large, green and black tracked tractor with an enclosed cabin, wide rubber tracks, and heavy-duty front and rear features. It is designed for powerful performance and operator comfort.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide tracks, dual exhaust stacks, and the prominent green hood with roof-mounted lights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the tracks, the enclosed cabin with large windows, and the detailed engine compartment.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the heavy-duty hitch, hydraulic connections, and the back of the cabin with visible safety lights.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tracks, cabin, and exhaust stack, with yellow track wheels clearly visible.
attribute_wheel_configuration: Four wide rubber tracks, no traditional wheels, all-track drive
attribute_cabin_design: Enclosed cabin with large glass windows, side mirrors, roof lights, and safety beacons; designed for operator comfort and protection
